title: Rainbow Designs DN1471 Winnie The Pooh & Friends Pooh Classic Tigger Soft Toy (12Cm),Brown
features: FAVOURITE CHARACTER: Introduce your child to the world of Winnie the Pooh with this Tigger soft toy in a classic design. Based on the bouncing tiger from A. A. Milne's Tales from Hundred Acre Wood, this gorgeously soft plushy is beautifully made in a classic traditional styling to look just like the wonderful character from the books from AA Milne and the illustrations of EH Shephard.

SUPER SOFT CUDDLY TOY: This adorable cuddly toy is ultra-soft to the touch and would make the perfect plushy companion for newborn babies and toddlers alike. With his soft 'fur' and squishy arms and legs, classic Tigger is both fun and safe for little ones.

ENDLESS ADVENTURES: Engage their imagination, the adventures that can be created for play are endless with this Classic Tigger soft toy. Have him bouncing up and down, singing songs, and looking for Christopher Robin in your very own Hundred Acre Wood.

COLLECT HIS FRIENDS: This gorgeous design isn't just limited to Tigger. Fans of Disney's Winnie the Pooh can also collect the Piglet, Eeyore, and of course Pooh, all in this beautiful, traditional design and super soft material.

A PERFECT GIFT: Ideal as a gift for the new baby in your life, this classic Tigger is great for newborns and small children. A throwback to your own childhood, you'll have hours of fun teaching the little recipient of your gift all about Tigger and his friends, and pass down a treasured, traditional story.
description: From the manufacturer A TIMELESS CLASSIC STUFFED TOY Winnie the Pooh and his friends are some of Britain’s most loved childhood characters. Since A. A Milne published his collection of Winnie the Pooh children's stories in 1926, these lovable characters and the stories that follow them have delighted people of all ages. You can now create your own collection of Christopher Robin plush toys with this darling Eeyore teddy. This cute soft toy will captivate your child, opening their hearts and mind to the wonderful world of Winnie the Pooh and friends. Divinely soft, this Eeyore toy will make the perfect companion for your baby to take hold of for hours of play and cuddles. A WINNIE THE POOH TOY THEY WILL CHERISH Embroidered with intricate features, this high-quality Eeyore teddy won’t just be a disposable gift that comes and goes, but a keepsake that your child can keep with them for life. Eeyore's adorable little bow and tail, with fluffy mane and floppy ears, will captivate the attention of babies as something they can use those curious little hands to fiddle with. Part of the Classic Pooh collection, your baby won’t be able to put this plushie down. Our baby blue Eeyore will animate children, bringing The Tales from the Hundred Acre Wood to life. Is the Hundred Acre Wood Eeyore Soft Toy durable? Made from high-quality plush fabric, this Hundred Acre Wood Eeyore Soft Toy is durable and is designed to last a long time. Made with children in mind, lots of usage and occasional washes shouldn’t have an effect on the longevity of this toy. Is this a large toy? This Eeyore cuddly teddy measures 13.5 (L) x 15 (W) x 17.5 (H) cm, making it a small to medium-sized toy that will fit perfectly in the hands of children and be an optimum size for them to cuddle in their cots.
